_comment: GENERATION parameters. None of this comes from an AMP dictionary — a dictionary describes columns, not cohorts.
_amp_ad_cohort_comment: DiverseCohorts is the AMP-AD harmonisation layer across 14 brain banks. Its `cohort` element ('The initial study group population to which the individual belonged') lists these 14. ROS and MAP together ARE ROSMAP — so a ROS/MAP subject carries BOTH the DiverseCohorts harmonised fields AND ROSMAP's native fields, measured from the same autopsy. A Mayo Clinic subject has no ROSMAP data at all. The list is the AMP file's own; the WEIGHTS below are mine.
_cohort_gate_comment: Which subjects appear in which table. A table listed here is emitted ONLY for subjects whose cohort is in its list. Tables not listed here take every subject of their program.
